sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 58:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 58:1
items.html: The first is what is regarded as Malchut of the upper one. The second is what is regarded as the substance of the emanated degree itself (see answer 127).
